description_long: This wallet features a rectangular shape with rounded edges and a prominent python-skin pattern in shades of gray, black, and taupe. The exterior is likely made of faux or genuine leather with a detailed snakeskin print, giving it a luxurious and textured appearance. A gold-toned zipper runs along the top edge, with a matching gold zipper pull attached to a wrist strap for easy carrying. The wrist strap is made from the same material and pattern as the wallet body, attached to one end with a metal ring. The wallet appears to be of medium size, suitable for holding cash, cards, and small personal items. There is a small gold emblem or logo on the front center, adding a subtle decorative accent.
description: A medium-sized, python-patterned wallet with a gold zipper and matching wrist strap, featuring a small gold emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the python-skin pattern, gold emblem, and attached wrist strap on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, gold zipper, and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full python pattern and the wrist strap extending to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge and the absence of the wrist strap attachment.
attribute_brand_logo: A small gold emblem is visible on the front center of the wallet, but no recognizable brand name or symbol is clearly identifiable.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Python-skin pattern in shades of gray, black, and taupe covering the entire exterior.
attribute_attachment_or_chain: A wrist strap made of matching python-patterned material is attached to one end of the wallet with a gold metal ring.
